title: Palak Tofu / Palak Paneer Bowl
description: A quick spinach curry bowl made with either tofu or paneer and a lightly spiced tomato-ginger base.
steps: Blanch or sauté the spinach for two to three minutes.
Blend the spinach with the tomato and ginger.
Heat the oil, add cumin, then add the spinach paste and spices.
Add the tofu or paneer cubes.
Cook for five to seven minutes and serve hot.
notes: Use tofu for a vegan version and oil rather than ghee.
